## Risk level
- [ ] Low: documentation or reversible internal change
- [ ] Medium: workflow or noncritical system behavior
- [ ] High: production, customer data, payments, permissions, or irreversible impact

## Approval checklist
- [ ] Scope matches the Issue
- [ ] No secrets or customer data are committed
- [ ] Tests or manual checks completed
- [ ] Rollback approach documented where relevant
- [ ] Required human approval obtained
- [ ] Documentation/SOP updated
